<!-- Thanks for the PR. Fill in the sections below. -->

## Summary

One paragraph. What does this PR change and why?

## Type

- [ ] Spec change (link to RFC issue)
- [ ] New canonical loop
- [ ] Engine adapter
- [ ] CLI / Inspector / Observatory
- [ ] Docs / patterns / essays
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Other

## Spec impact

If this touches `spec/`, link the RFC issue and summarize the conformance delta.
If it doesn't touch `spec/`, write "none".

## Conformance

If this PR adds or changes a Loopfile feature, did you:

- [ ] Update `spec/loopfile-v1.md`
- [ ] Update `spec/grammar.ebnf`
- [ ] Update `spec/schema.json`
- [ ] Update `spec/compatibility.md`
- [ ] Add or update an example Loopfile in `examples/` or `loops/`
- [ ] Run `infini validate` against every Loopfile in the repo

## Tests

- [ ] This PR adds tests
- [ ] This PR updates tests
- [ ] N/A — docs / essay only

## Backwards compatibility

If this is a breaking change, link the migration entry in `spec/migration.md`.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] My commits are signed (`git commit -S`)
- [ ] I have used Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `spec:`, `chore:`)
- [ ] This PR is one concern (no bundled changes)
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` if appropriate
